headline: A Look At Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Valuation After ChipStack AI Super Agent Level 5 Autonomy Announcement
summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) is in focus after unveiling the ChipStack AI Super Agent at Level-5 autonomy, an AI design engineer that independently runs complex chip design and verification workflows for semiconductor customers. See our latest analysis for Cadence Design Systems. The ChipStack AI Super Agent announcement comes after a 37.76% 90-day share price return and a 33.43% year-to-date share price return. The 5-year total shareholder return of 231.51% points to powerful long-term...

headline: Jim Cramer Won't Recommend Mortgage Stocks Because 'I Never Know What They Really Own' — But He Loves Intel's 'Burgeoning Packaging Division'
summary: On CNBC's “Mad Money Lightning Round,” Jim Cramer said that the quarterly results released by Clover Health Investments Corp were "not good." Due to the lackluster results, investors would need to be in "pure spec mode," he added. While the...
